persona.name: Amara Okafor
persona.role: Senior Data Engineer, Interswitch — FSWP applicant

scenes.dsl:
> Amara Okafor lands on CanaDREAMERS. Lagos, 11 PM. CRS 470, eleven points short.
  @ Stop guessing. Start belonging.
  "5 Let me see if they verify their consultants. I've seen too many fake agents in Lagos.
  @ Find a Consultant
  "3 Let me find who does FSWP.
  ! Find a Consultant

args.narrate: Amara Okafor lands on CanaDREAMERS. Lagos, 11 PM. CRS 470, eleven points short.

args.thought: Let me see if they verify their consultants. I've seen too many fake agents in Lagos.
Let me find who does FSWP.

scenes.dsl:
> Chris Daw. CICC verified, Federal Skilled Worker specialist, $250. From the database, not a mock.
  @ Chris Daw
  "5 CICC Verified. FSWP. $250 consultation. He can't disappear with my money.
  @ Sign In
  ! Sign In

args.narrate: Chris Daw. CICC verified, Federal Skilled Worker specialist, $250. From the database, not a mock.

args.thought: CICC Verified. FSWP. $250 consultation. He can't disappear with my money.

scenes.dsl:
> Two portals. Amara picks User Dashboard.
  ! User Dashboard

args.narrate: Two portals. Amara picks User Dashboard.

scenes.dsl:
> Amara signs up. Three fields. The identity she's about to leave behind.
  = Full Name | Amara Okafor
  = Email | amara.okafor@interswitch.com
  = Password | AmaraCanada2026!
  "3 My Interswitch email. The company I'm about to leave.
  ! Create Account

args.narrate: Amara signs up. Three fields. The identity she's about to leave behind.

args.thought: My Interswitch email. The company I'm about to leave.

scenes.dsl:
> The Pathfinder. Three questions. Where are you?
  @ Outside Canada
  "3 Lagos. Not in Canada. Not yet.
  ! Outside Canada

args.narrate: The Pathfinder. Three questions. Where are you?

args.thought: Lagos. Not in Canada. Not yet.

scenes.dsl:
> What brings you? Five paths.
  @ I want to work and live in Canada
  "3 Work and live. The honest path.
  ! I want to work and live in Canada

args.match: I want to work and live in Canada
args.thought: Work and live. The honest path.

click.match: I want to work and live in Canada

scenes.dsl:
> Do you have a job offer? The fork.
  @ No, not yet
  "5 No job offer. No employer. Express Entry. FSWP. Just me and the points system.
  ! No, not yet

args.narrate: Do you have a job offer? The fork.

args.thought: No job offer. No employer. Express Entry. FSWP. Just me and the points system.

scenes.dsl:
> Three clicks. Skilled Worker Applicant. The platform knows who Amara is.
  @ Your journey is set
  "3 Skilled Worker Applicant. Three clicks, not five forms. The platform gets it.
  @ Continue to Dashboard
  "3 Let me see what's on the other side.
  ! Continue to Dashboard

args.narrate: Three clicks. Skilled Worker Applicant. The platform knows who Amara is.

args.thought: Skilled Worker Applicant. Three clicks, not five forms. The platform gets it.
Let me see what's on the other side.

scenes.dsl:
> Amara lands on her dashboard. Skilled Worker Applicant. The Pathfinder resolved her archetype in three clicks. The journey begins here.
  "5 I'm in. The platform knows I'm a skilled worker outside Canada with no job offer. Express Entry. FSWP. Now I need to build my profile, get my CRS score, and find Chris Daw.

args.narrate: Amara lands on her dashboard. Skilled Worker Applicant. The Pathfinder resolved her archetype in three clicks. The journey begins here.

args.thought: I'm in. The platform knows I'm a skilled worker outside Canada with no job offer. Express Entry. FSWP. Now I need to build my profile, get my CRS score, and find Chris Daw.
